creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

I already wrote about this issue here but not sure if I should also create a BUG:
- https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/1154

By default Poudriere uses ZROOTFS=/poudriere and BASEFS=/usr/local/poudriere in the config.

When I have set these to ZROOTFS=/usr/local/poudriere and BASEFS=/usr/local/poudriere (to the same place) then almost entire /usr/local gets wiped after executing the `poudriere jail` command - for example like below:

# poudriere jail -c -j 14-1-R-amd64 -v 14.1-RELEASE

Details and entire process is added in the ISSUE on GitHub:
- https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/1154

Regards,
vermaden
